title: Sengoku Era
description: This is a mod pack Based around the sengoku overhaul mod has a few additional addons.
body:
Welcome to the start of a long Journey
⚔️ Sengoku Era: Warring States ⚔️
A Minecraft Modpack Inspired by Feudal Japan

Step into the Sengoku Period (1467–1615) — an age of war, honor, and powerful clans. In this modpack, the peaceful world of Minecraft transforms into a land of samurai, castles, and legendary battles.

Build your own Japanese fortress, forge powerful katana, explore breathtaking feudal villages, and survive in a world shaped by warring factions and ancient traditions.

Will you become a legendary samurai, a wandering ronin, or the ruler of a powerful clan?

🏯 Features
⚔️ Samurai Combat
Fight using katanas, polearms, and traditional weapons inspired by the Sengoku era.

🏯 Feudal Japanese Building
Construct authentic Japanese castles, temples, and villages using traditional architecture.

🌸 Immersive World
Explore landscapes inspired by feudal Japan including:

Cherry blossom forests

Mountain temples

Samurai villages

Hidden shrines

Ancient battlefields

🎴 Cultural Immersion
Experience elements inspired by traditional Japanese culture:

Samurai armor

Bamboo forests

Lantern-lit temples

Tea houses and shrines

 
🧱 Core Gameplay
This modpack focuses on:

✔ Exploration
✔ Combat
✔ Building Japanese architecture
✔ Survival with immersive atmosphere

👥 Multiplayer Friendly
Perfect for servers where players can:

Create rival clans

Build massive castles

Control territory

Start samurai wars

🌸 Begin Your Journey
Forge your blade.
Build your castle.
Defend your clan.

Welcome to the Sengoku Era.

💬 Need Help or Want to Join the Community?

Join our official support Discord for updates, help, and to connect with other players:
https://discord.gg/9unvpdMwFz
